name: Friskies Cat Duck Gravy 85g
description: Made with high-quality, carefully selected natural ingredients, it provides the nutrients your cat needs to maintain muscle health, vitality, and overall well-being. The recipe is free from artificial flavourings, colourants, and preservatives — ensuring a wholesome, gentle option for everyday feeding. Key Benefits • Tender duck chunks in delicious gravy for irresistible taste. • High-quality protein supports strong muscles and vitality. • Helps maintain hydration — perfect for cats that drink little water. • Gentle on sensitive stomachs thanks to all-natural ingredients. • No artificial flavours, colours, or preservatives. Feeding Guidelines • For an average adult cat (4 kg): Feed 4 pouches daily, split into 2 meals. • Serve at room temperature for best taste and aroma. • Discard any uneaten food after 2 hours. • Fresh drinking water should always be available.
